title: Scenario
description: Definition of a simulation scenario for practice or assessment

description.description: What this scenario tests and teaches

practiceType.description: Which of the 4 practice types this scenario exercises

learningObjectives.description: What the learner should gain from completing this scenario

contextualizedFrom.description: Reference to course materials or CollaborAITE data used to contextualize this scenario (optional)

setup.description: The scenario context presented to the learner

context.description: Background information. Either a plain string, or an object with aiOutput/groundTruth/errors for output_evaluation scenarios.

aiOutput.description: The AI-generated output the learner will evaluate (output_evaluation)

groundTruth.description: Narrative explanation of what is accurate/misleading in aiOutput

errors.description: Structured metadata for each embedded error in aiOutput. Optional — enables the Annotated Reveal step in scenario-runner.

id.description: Short identifier like e1, e2 used in reveal legend

quote.description: Exact substring from aiOutput anchoring this error

lineStart.description: 1-indexed line in aiOutput where the error begins

lineEnd.description: 1-indexed line in aiOutput where the error ends

explanation.description: Brief explanation shown to the learner in the reveal legend

expectedBehaviors.description: What good and bad learner behaviors look like

flawType.description: For bad-agent-simulator scenarios: what flaw the simulated agent exhibits

appropriatenessType.description: For appropriateness_judgment scenarios: whether AI is appropriate and how clear-cut the answer is
